name: USS PC-1181 (PC-1181)
events: 26 Feb 1945 USS Barbero (Cdr. I.S. Hartman, USN) departed Cristobal, Panama Canal Zone for the Portsmouth Navy Yard. She was escorted to Key West by USS PC 1181.
2 Mar 1945 USS Barbero (Cdr. I.S. Hartman, USN) departed Key West, Florida for the Portsmouth Navy Yard. She was escorted by USS SC 541.
